touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to Director of Sales at AtomHub regarding rep productivity tools. Email highlighted automation capabilities and time savings for sales teams. Jude responded expressing interest in learning more.

Brief qualification call with Jude to understand AtomHub's current sales process and pain points. Confirmed team size of 7 reps struggling with manual CRM updates and call note-taking. Jude mentioned they're also evaluating Fathom.

questions_asked.question: What's driving you to look at automation tools right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our reps spend 2-3 hours daily on admin work instead of selling

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: We're competitive and offer more comprehensive automation beyond just call recording

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with case studies from similar SaaS companies and ROI calculator. Jude confirmed review and availability for discovery call next week.

questions_asked.question: Do you have any customers in our industry vertical?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, shared three SaaS customer case studies with similar team sizes

touches.ai_summary: Deep discovery call covering AtomHub's full sales tech stack, current workflows, and specific pain points. Jude walked through their typical sales cycle and identified key automation opportunities. Discussed integration requirements and team adoption concerns. Fathom mentioned as current frontrunner but Jude interested in unlimited automation tier.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through what happens after a sales call today - what's manual?
questions_asked.answer: Reps manually log calls, write summaries, update 6-8 fields in Salesforce, send follow-ups

questions_asked.question: What are the must-have capabilities versus nice-to-haves?
questions_asked.answer: Must-have: call recording, auto-logging, CRM sync. Nice: email automation, deal insights

questions_asked.question: What's your implementation timeline and what support do you provide?
questions_asked.answer: 2-week implementation with dedicated CSM, training included in all plans

objections: Team worried about learning curve with new tools

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session rescheduled once, then completed with Jude and two sales reps. Demonstrated live call recording, AI summarization, automated CRM updates, and email workflows. Reps tested the interface and asked detailed questions about Salesforce integration. Compared feature-by-feature against Fathom capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Can this integrate with our existing Salesforce custom fields?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable field mapping during setup

questions_asked.question: What's the accuracy rate on your AI summaries?
questions_asked.answer: 95%+ accuracy, with ability to edit and provide feedback to improve

questions_asked.question: How quickly can your team get this deployed for 7 users?
questions_asked.answer: Full deployment in 10 business days with training sessions included

objections: Pricing higher than Fathom's quoted rate
Want to see more proof it works with Salesforce

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Jude to discuss business case and ROI. Walked through implementation plan and success metrics. Jude acknowledged he hasn't looped in VP Sales yet but feels confident in the solution. Discussed budget and pricing expectations.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in the final decision?
questions_asked.answer: Ultimately our VP Sales, but I have budget authority for tools under $5K

questions_asked.question: What does your decision timeline look like?
questions_asked.answer: Want to decide this month, implementation by end of quarter

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the unlimited automation tier pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with our team and come back with options

next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing options
Follow up on exec sponsor introduction

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up exec meeting rescheduled once, then held with Jude to review proposal. Discussed pricing in detail and budget constraints. Jude pushing for deeper discount to match Fathom's offer. Still no VP Sales involvement mentioned. Timeline pressure from Jude's side to close before month-end.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Fathom's pricing or get closer to their number?
questions_asked.answer: We can work on discount but our unlimited automation provides more value than Fathom's core offering

questions_asked.question: Would it help to have our VP Customer Success join to discuss implementation and support?
questions_asked.answer: Maybe, but really need the pricing to work first

objections: Price gap with Fathom still too wide
Need to show this to finance before committing

touches.ai_summary: Sent revised proposal email with 40.5% discount to hit Jude's budget target of $4,400 ACV for 7 seats. Outlined final terms, contract length, and implementation timeline. Jude responded positively, indicated he's ready to move forward pending final finance review.

Final pricing call to confirm commercial terms and address last questions. Jude confirmed $4,400 ACV works within budget and he's prepared to sign. Discussed contract terms, payment schedule, and kickoff timing. Still proceeding with only Jude as single point of contact - no broader executive validation secured.

questions_asked.question: Can we do monthly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure as monthly with 12-month commitment

questions_asked.question: When can we schedule kickoff with your team and VP Sales?
questions_asked.answer: I'll coordinate the team - can kick off next week once contract is signed
